name: zdeclient_shutdown_globals
description: zDEClient::ShutdownGlobals clears feature entries/map state, frees quicksand/crater global arrays, disables quicksand, calls the no-op return stub, and returns zero.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ShutdownGlobals@zDEClient@@YAHXZ at 0x455e40 still fails: 48 unmasked mismatches, 40 relocation bytes masked, 8 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 93 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.

Reviewed difference is branch layout plus imported free call/source-shape drift: original uses a pushed esi import pointer for repeated free calls, while current source emits direct free relocations. The native smoke verifies disabled fast path, feature-map cleanup, quicksand/crater array frees, global nulling, and return status.
